title: HIUME Building Bricks Classic 1500 Pieces Kids Age 6+ Building Blocks Box Compatible with Top Brand and All Major Brands,12 Colors 14 Bulk Shapes for Boys and Girls
features: 1500 Basic Building Blocks: A large set of colorful building blocks with random pieces, primarily medium and small-sized, making them perfect for constructing intricate structures and detailed models. Featuring a variety of shapes and colors, these blocks are crafted with precision to meet children's diverse building needs and inspire endless creativity!

Compatible with Construction Building Blockss: Compatible with construction building blocks, it also adapts to the buillding block base and block table, ensuring that your child can join in the block play at any time.
Safe and Odourless: Made of excellent quality ABS material non-toxic and odourless, the building blocks are smooth and burr-free, easy to clean and a quality toy for your child.

Quality STEM Toys: Stimulate your child's creativity, imagination and other thinking logic skills and hands-on skills in the building process of the blocks. Children grow through play and learn through play.
Perfect Present: 1200PCS building blocks is a perfect present for Various festivals, it will surely bring surprise and happiness to your child.
description: Product Description Specialist Tools Professional tools will be included to make the blocks more comfortable to play with. No more worries about overly sturdy blocks being difficult to dismantle! Multi-colours Building Bricks Multi-colours give children more scope for imagination More building block shapes give children more possibilities to build Sturdy Building Blocks There is no need to worry about the collapse of a carefully constructed block world due to poorly installed blocks. Choose HIUME blocks for more playful fun
